title: Menisorus pauciflorus
taxonomy: Menisorus pauciflorus is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Menisorus pauciflorus is further detailed as follows: it belongs to the genus Menisorus, which is a part of the subfamily Rauvolfioideae within the Apocynaceae family. The plant is a climber, often found in tropical rainforests. Its classification is well-documented in botanical literature, providing insights into its evolutionary relationships and phylogenetic position.
